jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Emami
jsonLd.description:
Emami has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Emami:
Emami is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emami!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
